item.title: HonestFrank: Lydia Hislop reposteó Francis Keogh @HonestFrank · 15 abr. ‘It happens in every racing yard. Everyone laughs and flirts
item.description:
Lydia Hislop reposteó Francis Keogh @HonestFrank · 15 abr. ‘It happens in every racing yard. Everyone laughs and flirts with all the girls.’
Read the full story as former head travelling lad David Hickin, 37, is banned from the sport for 32 months for sexual misconduct and abusing his position
#HorseRacing
http:// frankkeogh.substack.com/publish/post/1 94278008 … 4 9 13 22 mil

item.description:

item.title: itvracing: ITV Racing @itvracing · 9min • Main signs Lucinda gets with a National horse • Which Grand National winner gave her the
item.description:
